chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition No.D-09 of 2022. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on M.A.No.140/2022. 02. For orders on office objection as flag “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.159/2022. 04. For orders on M.A.No.160/2022. 05. For hearing of main case. 26.01.2022 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed Abro, Advocate for the petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = Heard. The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has mainly sought for declaration that the subject property is “Dharamshala/Mandir”; the status of the property being “Dharamshala/Mandir” or otherwise involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. J JUDGE
